---
title: "Evenemang"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "chen.ist Academy-evenemang genomförs på engelska och rumänska. Bli partner för att arrangera i din stad."
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Evenemang</h1>
    <p>Hackathons, workshops och community-träffar. Bygg något riktigt med engagerade människor.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Evenemang på engelska & rumänska</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Våra evenemang genomförs för närvarande på engelska och rumänska i Rumänien. Utforska det fullständiga programmet nedan.</p>
      <a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Se alla evenemang (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <h2>Kommande evenemang</h2>
    <p class="sub">Klicka för fullständig information på engelska.</p>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-cpu" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html">AI Ethics Hackathon</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 5 mars 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bukarest</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Öppen</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html">Sommarskola 2026</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 1–15 aug 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Snart</div>
    </div>
    <div class="up-item">
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
      <div style="flex-grow:1;">
        <h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html">SpaceApps Challenge</a></h4>
        <div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Oktober 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Snart</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Vill du arrangera i din stad?</h2>
    <p>Bli partner med vår academy och organisera hackathons, workshops eller utbildningar i ditt företag eller din stad.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/sv/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Bli partner</a>
      <a href="/sv/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Läs mer om partnerskap</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
